problem: Aurora audio conformance is the weakest current release axis, but the next work must distinguish true runtime cue gaps from broad or missing reference measurements.
strategy: Reuse the latest captured Aurora audio comparison metrics, rank event cues by active-duration/timbre/reference-window risk, and expose missing critical cue coverage before tuning.
successMeasure: The next audio cycle should reduce missing critical comparison coverage, narrow broad reference windows, and lower the highest-risk event cue gaps without regressing gameplay guardrails.

comparedCueRisks.label: Challenge Perfect
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether a perfect challenge result feels more celebratory than the standard results cue.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Capture Beam
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether the beam deploy moment reads clearly as tractor-beam danger.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Challenge Results
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether challenge wrap-up feels like a proper result phrase instead of a generic transition.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Fighter Captured
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare the exact moment the fighter is fully captured, distinct from beam deploy and retreat.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Enemy Shot
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether enemy fire is distinct enough from player fire and boss damage.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Player Shot
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether player fire reads as a quick arcade shot instead of a generic impact.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Demo Pulse
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare autoplay cadence and whether the board feels mechanically alive enough once demo motion begins.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Boss Hit
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether boss damage reads as a distinct multi-hit event.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Rescue Join
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether the rescue/join moment feels celebratory and distinct from ordinary scoring.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Formation Pulse
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare ongoing formation cadence and whether gameplay feels like it has enough marching pressure.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Ship Loss
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether ship loss feels like a real Galaga death moment rather than a generic impact.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: High Score 1st
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether first place entry feels distinct and more important than a lower board placement.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: High Score 2nd-10th
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether non-first leaderboard entry feels positive but smaller than first place.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Challenge Transition
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare how distinct and ceremonial the challenge-stage announcement feels.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Boss Boom
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether boss destruction feels larger and more final than normal enemy destruction.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Prioritize impact/explosion event clarity so the player understands damage, kill, and boss multi-hit state.

comparedCueRisks.label: Capture Retreat
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether the post-capture retreat phase remains audible as a distinct state.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Game Over
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether the ending cue feels final and emotionally complete enough.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Enemy Hit
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether an enemy impact gives immediate hit confirmation.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Prioritize impact/explosion event clarity so the player understands damage, kill, and boss multi-hit state.

comparedCueRisks.label: Enemy Boom
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether normal enemy destruction is more emphatic than a simple hit.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Prioritize impact/explosion event clarity so the player understands damage, kill, and boss multi-hit state.

comparedCueRisks.label: Captured Fighter Destroyed
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare the regret/penalty moment when the carried fighter is destroyed.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Stage Start
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether stage start feels like a clear arcade start/announcement instead of a generic cue.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

nextStep: Tune the highest-risk runtime cue next: Challenge Perfect. Rerun audio comparison and event-gap analysis after the change.
